steps.assistant_text: Init helper, 94.4%->exact — the cap was a WRONG SIGNATURE, not coloring. Splat-guessed int*-return builds 3 LRs (p->v1, param->a0, return-copy->v0): the return-value LR ALWAYS claims $v0 with a trailing move v0,v1 in the jr delay (26w). Declared VOID: the copy candidate p itself colors v0 by first-appearance, const 112 becomes a ugen temp in the freed v1, jr delay = nop — exact. The word-1 move v0,a0 was the candidate copy, not return targeting. Load-bearing detail: a0 = 0; kill after block 1 keeps p a real second web (block-1 base a0, blocks 2-4 base v0). DIAGNOSTIC: 'v0/v1 swap + trailing move v0,v1 + target jr-delay nop' on a returns-its-arg-looking fn = return-value-LR claim; uoptlist tell = a 3rd isvar R LR assigned R1 — check void-ness before grinding coloring.
